subcodes.first_line: O Beloved! Upon thee be My salutation. He Who was with Me made mention of thee. We have remembered thee in Our prison. We beseech God that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیب علیک سلامی قد ذکرک من کان معی ذکرناک فی سجنی نسئل الله ان
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
